text.message: May I have the 3 brick spot?

no plowing for the game through

There were more spots, that's why I asked

i promise dude i didnt understand

I mean I dont care now man I dont have win condition after that treason

i can try to make it up to you?
give you two bricks and a nb or smthing

i can leave the road path for you open idk
I dont have brick to play road or wheat to play army, dont worry, just play your game
